description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a minimalist cubic design, featuring clean white facades and flat roofs. The structure includes three visible levels, with the top floor incorporating a rooftop garden and terrace area. The ground floor has a covered carport with two vehicles parked beneath the main living area, and a wide driveway leading up to the entrance. Large, rectangular windows are arranged in a regular grid pattern on the front and sides, providing ample natural light. The property is landscaped with several trees and shrubs, and a small detached structure, possibly a shed or utility room, is visible at the rear. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, three-story cubic house with flat roofs, rooftop garden, covered carport, and regular grid windows, surrounded by landscaped trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered carport with two cars, wide driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the flat roof, rooftop garden, and a small detached structure behind the house, with trees lining the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, rooftop terrace, and more landscaping, with the carport and driveway partially visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the carport, driveway extending to the street, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, covered carport, and a simple, flush door integrated into the facade, no decorative columns or overhangs.
